close_reason: Created solidity_test.bzl using forge test with fuzz and fork support
description:
Create nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/solidity/solidity_test.bzl

Attributes:
- srcs: test source files (*.t.sol)
- deps: solidity_library targets
- test_match: test function pattern (optional)
- fork_url: RPC URL for mainnet forking (optional)
- fuzz_runs: fuzz testing iterations (default 256)

Implementation:
- Create temporary Foundry project structure
- Symlink sources and dependencies
- Generate remappings.txt from deps
- Run forge test with Buck2 test runner integration
- Parse forge JSON output for test results

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create solidity_test rule
